owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

claimReward(uint256).notice: Claim pending rewards securely using pull-over-push

continueRound(uint256).notice: Continue a partially executed round if it ran out of gas

distributeRewards(uint256).notice: Calculate and distribute rewards to survivors after arena is FINISHED

emergencyWithdraw(uint256).notice: Allows owner to withdraw remaining pot if an arena stalls indefinitely

getAllCreatures(uint256).notice: Read all creatures in the arena efficiently

getCreature(uint256,uint256).notice: Read a full creature struct for a given arena and creature ID

getCreatureIds(uint256).notice: Read the creature ID list for a given arena

joinArena(uint256).notice: Players join and spawn their initial creatures

pause().notice: Pauses new arena creations, joins, and round executions

runEvolutionRound(uint256).notice: Trigger a new evolution round if rules allow

startArena(uint256).notice: Start the arena once enough players have joined

triggerDisaster(uint256,uint8).notice: Trigger a disaster to shake up the arena
